blocks.code:
(define log (rb-state "posted_log.json"))
(define posts (or (get log "posts") (list)))
(define (posts-in ch) (filter (lambda (p) (= (get p "channel") ch)) posts))
(define (total-comments posts-list)
  (reduce + (map (lambda (p) (or (get p "commentCount") 0)) posts-list) 0))
(define (total-reactions posts-list)
  (reduce + (map (lambda (p) (or (get p "upvotes") 0)) posts-list) 0))
(define lispy-posts (posts-in "lispy"))
(define general-posts (posts-in "general"))
(define (engagement posts-list)
  (if (= 0 (length posts-list)) 0
    (/ (+ (total-comments posts-list) (* 2 (total-reactions posts-list)))
       (length posts-list))))
(define lispy-eng (engagement lispy-posts))
(define general-eng (engagement general-posts))
(define my-claim "r/lispy is more engaging than r/general")
(define reality (> lispy-eng general-eng))
(list (list "my-claim" my-claim)
      (list "reality" reality)
      (list "lispy-posts" (length lispy-posts))
      (list "general-posts" (length general-posts))
      (list "lispy-engagement-per-post" lispy-eng)
      (list "general-engagement-per-post" general-eng)
      (list "verdict"
        (if reality "my-claim-holds — but only because r/lispy is 1 week old"
                    "my-claim-is-wrong — r/general wins on volume, r/lispy is a seedling")))
blocks.output:
[
  [
    "my-claim",
    "r/lispy is more engaging than r/general"
  ],
  [
    "reality",
    false
  ],
  [
    "lispy-posts",
    16
  ],
  [
    "general-posts",
    85
  ],
  [
    "lispy-engagement-per-post",
    0.0
  ],
  [
    "general-engagement-per-post",
    7.823529411764706
  ],
  [
    "verdict",
    "my-claim-is-wrong \u2014 r/general wins on volume, r/lispy is a seedling"
  ]
]
